videos.headline: JJ Buchanan brings it down for Utah TD
videos.description: Devon Dampier airs one out to JJ Buchanan who brings it down in the end zone for Utah vs. West Virginia.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (JJ Buchanan brings it down for Utah TD) 2025/09/27 ESHEET

videos.headline: Dallen Bentley hauls it in for Utah TD
videos.description: Devon Dampier finds an open Dallen Bentley for another Utah touchdown vs. West Virginia.
